rules: All numeric inputs must be positive numbers.

suggestedActions: Verify local building codes before purchasing.

description.short: Calculate tile cutting waste ratio for layout optimization.
description.long: Calculate tile cutting waste ratio for layout optimization.

short_i18n.en: Calculate tile cutting waste ratio for layout optimization.
short_i18n.tr: Kenarlarda oluşacak fayans kesim fire optimizasyon oranını hesaplar.
short_i18n.de: Berechnen Sie den Verschnittanteil bei der Fliesenverlegung zur Layoutoptimierung.
short_i18n.fr: Calculer le taux de déchet de coupe de carrelage pour l'optimisation de la disposition.
short_i18n.es: Calcular la tasa de desperdicio de corte de azulejos para optimización de diseño.
short_i18n.ar: احسب نسبة نفايات قطع البلاط لتحسين التخطيط.
